title: Empty pageContent field in Qdrant
symptom: When retrieving data from Qdrant, the 'pageContent' field is returned as empty despite successful embedding-based search.
applies_when: Payload does not include the correct field name
not_this_if: The payload includes the correct field name for content
root_cause: The 'pageContent' field remains empty because the original text was not stored correctly in the payload during the document insertion into Qdrant. The field name used in the payload must match the expected structure for retrieval.
fix_steps: Update the payload structure in your import script to include the correct field name.
Use 'content' as the key in the payload to store the original text.
Re-insert the document into the Qdrant collection.
agent_instruction: Ensure the payload includes 'content' as the key for the original text when inserting into Qdrant.
